_meta.purpose: Calibrated VFX-mode gauntlet bar (design/VFX_PIPELINE.md sections 1+4, First Build Step 1). Bands calibrated OFF the reference packs (Foozle CC0 is THE control), NOT the SPEC guesses.
_meta.generator: tools/assets (driver, Opus 4.8) calibration harness over the on-disk reference packs
_meta.extra_references: CodeManu free pixel effects fire sheets (11_fire, 9_brightfire, 6_flamelash) at _downloads/vfx_packs/codemanu_pixel_effects/extracted (8x8 or 7x7 grids of 100x100 cells)
_meta.gate_input_contract: The gate scores FINISHED frames (post tools/assets/anim_finish.py: shared-palette lock -> box downscale -> hard-edge alpha -> anchor-align). Foozle is already finish-quality; CodeManu RAW sheets are bulk-base that MUST pass anim_finish first (their raw AA edges + high colour counts legitimately fail the finished-frame gate until finished).
_meta.honest_finding: flat-run ratio does NOT cleanly separate detailed finished fire (codemanu downscaled ~0.53) from soft mush (raw apple 0.76) - resolution/detail density dominates it. The RELIABLE mush discriminators are n_colours (quantized <=110 vs raw 45000+) and whole-region Hasler-Susstrunk colourfulness (real fire spans a red->orange->yellow->white emissive ramp = high colourfulness; a mono-tint AI blob does not). A post-finished blob that survived anim_finish (hard-edged, 24-colour) is structurally indistinguishable from good fire by heuristics; its apple-vs-fireball SHAPE flaw is a job for the ADVISORY VLM identity lens, not a heuristic - forcing a heuristic to reject it would be overfitting.

lens_roles.note: Soft/sanity lenses are calibrated to the Foozle CONTROL (which legitimately travels up to 4.5px/frame and throws spark speckle) so the control passes; they gate only content WORSE than the reference. Advisory lenses log but never block (honest-degrade). Any hard lens returning explicit False blocks; an abstain (None) never blocks.

calibration_rationale.flat_run_floor: 0.50 -- Foozle min-frame 0.889, finished apple 0.928, but legit finished/downscaled CodeManu fire bottoms at 0.527; raw purple mush 0.363 fails. Set below finished-fire floor, above gradient mush.
calibration_rationale.n_colors_ceil: 110 (LAW, existing lens_pixel_art) -- Foozle 3-7, finished 24, CodeManu 8-85; raw AI 2982-106300 fails massively. THE primary mush gate.
calibration_rationale.partial_alpha_ceil: 0.005 (LAW, hard-edge backed) -- Foozle 0, finished 0. CodeManu RAW carries 2.8-5.3% AA halo (why raw sheets must be finished first). The single cheapest AI-soft-matte discriminator.
calibration_rationale.offramp_ceil: 0.03 -- set-mean fraction of opaque px with dE2000>10 to own 24-colour palette. Foozle 0, CodeManu 0-1.1% mean; raw purple 3.9% mean fails.
calibration_rationale.core_colourf_floor: 45.0 -- design SPEC; Hasler-Susstrunk of the brightest connected region must be vivid. All fire peaks >=45 (Foozle up to 139); this is the positive emissive requirement, not a mush rejector.
calibration_rationale.whole_colourf_floor: 80.0 -- set-mean Hasler-Susstrunk over the whole opaque region. Clean refs 99.6-164 (Foozle 106), finished apple 96; raw mono AI blobs 73-75 fail. The colourfulness-STRUCTURE lens (real fire spans a full emissive ramp; mono-tint mush does not).
calibration_rationale.dominant_frac_floor: 0.45 -- set-MEDIAN of the largest connected component's share. Foozle median 0.887 but individual spark frames drop to 0.173, so this is a loose set-level sanity floor, not a per-frame law (the SPEC 'one dominant blob, orphan=0' would wrongly reject the Foozle control's spark frames).
calibration_rationale.drift_ceil: 5.0 -- set-MAX centroid displacement. The Foozle control is a TRAVELLING projectile (up to 4.5px/frame on RAW un-anchored frames); ceiling set above it so the control passes. Finished/anchor-aligned candidates sit ~0. Gates only pathological jumps; the real <=1px LAW is enforced upstream by anim_finish anchor_align.
calibration_rationale.jaccard_floor: 0.80 -- set-MEAN frame-to-frame palette Jaccard (colours within dE2000<=10 shared). Foozle mean 0.886 (dips to 0.556 across a phase transition), so use the set-mean; catches inter-frame palette flicker worse than the control.

codemanu_actuals_raw.note: RAW sheet cells (pre-finish); inform band widening. whole_colourf/hotcore are the load-bearing calibration inputs (invariant to the AA-edge/colour-count that finishing removes).

mush_actuals.note: Known AI-mush clips used to validate the REJECT half of the gate.

rh_fb_clean_raw_apple.source: ComfyUI output rh_fb_clean_*.png (512x512 RGB soft Wan apple)

rh_vid_fireball_raw_purple.source: ComfyUI output rh_vid_fireball_*.png (480x480 RGB soft purple blob)

finished_apple.gate: PASS heuristics (legit crisp small-palette sprite); reads as apple not directional fireball -> caught only by the ADVISORY VLM identity lens. Not heuristically rejectable without overfitting.
